Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

HOW CAN I KNOW IF I AM ABLE TO APPLY AS AN INTERNATIONAL STUDENT?

Please read the rules on

our page

that are set by YÖK (Council of Higher Education of Turkey). You can always get in touch with us via

[email protected]

as well if you still have any concerns or questions regarding your eligibility.

CAN THE UNIVERSITY HELP ME TO GET A VISA?

If you are from countries that require a visa to enter Turkey, you can apply for the relevant visa with your acceptance letter. If you face any difficulties, you can always contact us via our e-mail address –

[email protected]

You should register and apply through our

website

.

IS THERE AN APPLICATION FEE?

There is no application fee for international students in Doğuş University. You can apply free of charge.

WHAT ARE THE TUITION FEES?

Please

click here

for the tuition fees and payment details.

WHAT ARE THE DOCUMENTS REQUIRED FOR APPLICATION AND REGISTRATION?

Please

click here

for detailed information about admission requirements for undergraduate programmes.

Please

click here

for detailed information about admission requirements for graduate programmes.

WHAT SHOULD I DO IF I CANNOT UPLOAD ALL THE REQUIRED DOCUMENTS TO THE ONLINE APPLICATION SYSTEM?

If you have a problem with this process, please inform us the situation and send the remaining documents via e-mail.

I HAD AN ISSUE WHILE FILLING OUT THE APPLICATION FORM AND NOW I CANNOT RETURN TO MY APPLICATION PAGE, WHAT SHOULD I DO?

Your application account is saved on the system so rest assured that you can relog into your account and continue your application process anytime you wish.

DO YOU REQUIRE RECOMMENDATION LETTERS/STATEMENT OF PURPOSE?

While recommendation letters or statements of purpose are not compulsory, they nonetheless may strengthen your application.

HOW LONG DOES THE EVALUATION PROCESS TAKE?

Usually, the application results reach the candidates within two weeks on average.

DO I NEED TO TAKE THE TOEFL?

If you hold a TOEFL exam result, you should upload the certificate during the online application process. Score required for TOEFL IBT is 72. If not, then you are required to take the Doğuş University English Proficiency Exam (DUIYES) during the registration week.

WILL THE UNIVERSITY HELP ME TO GET A STUDENT RESIDENCE PERMIT?

Yes, International Relations Officers will assist you in this process. You will be informed about the process via email before your arrival.

CAN I WORK PART-TIME DURING MY STUDIES IN TURKEY?

As long as you reside in Turkey on a student residence permit, you have the "right of work". This right shall start after the first year if you are an associate or undergraduate student while it shall start without time limit if you are a graduate or doctoral student. This service is carried out by the Ministry of Labor and Social Security and you can get detailed information from the ALO 170 information line.

I GRADUATED FROM A FOREIGN UNIVERSITY AND HAVE RECOGNITION PROBLEM IN TURKEY. HOW CAN I SOLVE THIS PROBLEM?

You need to contact Equivalency Unit of the Turkish Council of Higher Education. Please

click here

for the official website of the Equivalency Unit.

IS MY DIPLOMA THAT I GOT FROM A TURKISH UNIVERSITY VALID IN EUROPEAN UNION COUNTRIES?

Since Turkey is a part of European Higher Education Area, diplomas taken from Turkish Universities are recognized in European Union countries.
